sglang.title: [DeepEP] Add SGLANG_DEEPEP_BF16_DISPATCH env var in Normal mode
sglang.author: BBuf
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
DeepEP Normal mode (prefill) ignores the SGLANG_DEEPEP_BF16_DISPATCH environment variable and always quantizes activations to FP8, even when the flag is set to use BF16 dispatch.
This breaks Marlin MoE quantization, which requires FP16/BF16 activations and does not support FP8 activations

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Use lazy string reference for DeepseekV3Config in config registry
vllm.author: yongming-qin
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
Fix an inconsistency in _CONFIG_REGISTRY:
deepseek_v32 was the only entry using an eager class import:
deepseek_v32 = DeepseekV3Config
While all other entries use string-based lazy loading.
This caused unnecessary eager imports and broke environments with older transformers versions.
Fix:

C

vllm.title: [Model Runner V2] Change bookkeeping logic in preparation for spec decoding
vllm.author: WoosukKwon
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR updates the input-preparation and bookkeeping logic for the V2 model runner. The primary goal is to shift as much work as possible onto the GPU, laying the groundwork for async scheduling + speculative decoding.
Key changes


num_computed_tokens is now GPU-only.
The CPU no longer tracks this

vllm.title: [Model Runner V2] Support spec decoding [1/N]
vllm.author: WoosukKwon
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR introduces the foundational support for speculative decoding, including handling draft tokens during input preparation and enabling rejection sampling.
This PR itself doesn't enable any draft proposer yet. Eagle will be supported in a followup PR.

vllm.title: [Model Runner V2] Optimize CUDA graph capture time
vllm.author: WoosukKwon
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Currently, CUDA graph capture takes up to a minute because we run warmup with seq_lens=max_model_len.
This PR optimizes the warmup time by using seq_lens=1 instead.

vllm.title: [Model Runner V2] Add apply_temperature option to gumbel_sample
vllm.author: WoosukKwon
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR adds an option to apply temperature inside _gumbel_sample_kernel, which could reduce memory IO.
While this is not used for regular sampling, it will be used for generating draft tokens in spec decoding.

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Update Gradio OpenAI Chatbot Webserver example to new Gradio message history format
vllm.author: joshiemoore
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
In Gradio commit 4221290, support was added for an OpenAI-compatible message history format. Support for the old tuple-based format was deprecated in commit 20c0836 and removed in commit 4356fe7.
As a result, when attempting to run this example with the latest version of Gradio installed, al

vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
Currently, our LoRA weight processing for 3D MoE is very redundant, causing weight loading to be extremely time-consuming. This PR contains related logic that significantly reduces LoRA weight loading time

vllm.title: [Model] Add OpenCUA-7B support
vllm.author: lim4349
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
Add support for OpenCUA-7B, a multimodal model based on Qwen2.5-VL that uses 1D-RoPE instead of M-RoPE for the vision encoder. This PR enables vLLM to load and run inference with the OpenCUA-7B model from HuggingFace (xlangai/OpenCUA-7B).
Test Plan

This PR enables broader attention backend support for Whisper v1 on ROCm platform.

Aiter Unified Attention
Aiter Flash Attention
